column1: # Publishes the pfam-annogroups X orthogroups integration deliverables
# (non-bilaterian-metazoan focus). Source globs are relative to this manifest's
# Build with (from the integrator subproject root):
# This is a COPYME template (single source of truth). The discovery helper
# ignores manifests in workflow-COPYME-* dirs; copy this file into the
# canonical workflow-RUN_* dir for it to publish (per gigantic_conventions §38/§39).
# ----- Headline deliverables: the two integration tables -----

column6: One row per kept pfam annogroup (annogroups with at least one qualifying orthogroup: zero bilaterians and at least one non-bilaterian metazoan). Reports all of the annogroup's orthogroups grouped by the four composition classes (non_bilaterian_metazoan / non_metazoan_only / bilaterian_only / mixed_with_bilaterian) with per-class counts and ID lists, plus the annogroup's pfam accessions and definitions.

One row per qualifying orthogroup: zero bilaterian members and at least one non-bilaterian metazoan (sponge, cnidarian, ctenophore, placozoan). Non-metazoan unicellular outgroups may ride along; unicell-only orthogroups are excluded. Columns: member protein count, species count, and the species list.

Every orthogroup classified into one of four composition classes (bilaterian_only / mixed_with_bilaterian / non_bilaterian_metazoan / non_metazoan_only) against the Bilateria (C103) and Metazoa (C082) clades, with bilaterian / non-bilaterian-metazoan / non-metazoan species counts. The shared basis for Tables 1 and 2.
Fail-fast validation cross-checks (composition-class validity, Table 2 count, Table 1 arithmetic and referential integrity, and the keep-rule). Status PASS means every cross-check held.
